events.name: Milton, FL DOC
events.description: We trained 37 Teammates including 18 Rookies who had 186 Gospel conversations behind the walls. 25 inmates began relationships with Jesus and another 65 repented and returned to Him! We were also able to train 149 to share the Good News.
events.registrationDescription: We need 100+ Teammates including 25 Bikes to take the Gospel behind the walls of a men's correctional facility. If you are a female and would like to serve on this event, click here to see if you are eligible. Additional security form required to serve. More information on Event Info page.

equipIgniteTraining.instruction: Please arrive 15 minutes early to check-in

registrationInfo.importantInformation: Please arrive 15 minutes early for check-in. All participants must complete the security clearance form.
registrationInfo.travelInformation: Parking is available at the main entrance. Please carpool if possible. Nearest airport is Pensacola International Airport (PNS), approximately 20 miles away.
